testMessages.content:
🌅 Day 1 — Afternoon

The train had been climbing since dawn. The car smelled of coal smoke and bodies.

☀️ Day 1 — Evening

The Lucky Strike announced itself in piano music and lamp oil. Silas polished the same glass he'd been polishing when the sun was high.
I go to the Painted Lady.

🌙 Day 1 — Night

Clementine studied the newcomer the way a jeweler studies a stone. 'New face,' she said.
I watch the noon duel the next day.

☀️ Day 2 — Afternoon

The same man stepped into the street. The same stance. Briggs drew. The bullet hit the same spot — center mass, slightly left. The dust settled the same way it had yesterday. Exactly the same way.
